name: Proposal → Deal → Deal Room Pipeline
description: Auto-create/update deals when proposals are generated, advance stage to Opportunity, create Slack deal rooms with full briefing packs, and run async company research to enrich deal + contact records.

existingInfra.slackTables: ALL EXIST on staging (slack_org_settings, slack_notification_settings, slack_deal_rooms, slack_user_mappings, slack_notifications_sent)

decisions.dealStage: Opportunity (existing stage, no schema change needed)
decisions.dealCreation: Auto-create if no deal exists, using meeting context
decisions.dealRoomContent: Full briefing pack (PDF + deal summary + meeting highlights + next steps + actions)
decisions.dealRoomMembers: Deal owner + configured stakeholders from org settings
decisions.enrichment: Async after proposal ready — full company-research skill
decisions.existingDealBehavior: Advance to Opportunity (if earlier) + post new proposal to existing room

stories.title: Fix proposal metadata resolution (prepared_by, client name, company)
acceptance: Profile query uses first_name + last_name (not full_name which doesn't exist)
prepared_by shows 'Andrew Bryce' instead of 'Sales Team'
Client company extracted from email domain as fallback (aprilking.co.uk → April King)
Client name uses contact name from meeting context when full_name is null
stories.notes: Already partially done — profile interface + query fixed. Still need domain extraction helper and metadata fallback chain.

stories.title: Add deal auto-create/update logic to proposal pipeline
acceptance: When proposal is created with no deal_id: auto-create a deal with meeting context (company, contact, value if mentioned)
New deal stage set to Opportunity (8be6a854)
deal_id written back to the proposal row
When proposal has existing deal_id: advance stage to Opportunity if currently at SQL
Never downgrade a deal stage (Verbal/Signed stays as-is)
Deal name derived from contact company or meeting title
stories.notes: Insert as Stage 0 (pre-assembly). Runs before proposal-assemble-context so the deal_id is available for context assembly. Query deal_stages by name='Opportunity' to get the ID dynamically.

stories.title: Wire proposal 'ready' status to trigger deal room creation
acceptance: After proposal reaches 'ready' status, pipeline checks for existing deal room
If no room exists: invoke slack-deal-room to create channel
If room exists: skip creation (PDR-005 handles posting)
Slack org connection checked — gracefully skip if not connected
Non-fatal: deal room failure never blocks proposal delivery
stories.notes: Add as Stage 5b in the pipeline, after proposal-deliver. Use the existing slack-deal-room edge function — it already handles channel creation, invites, and stakeholder lookups.

stories.title: Build full briefing pack Slack message for deal rooms
acceptance: Slack Block Kit message includes: proposal PDF link, deal value, contact info, company name
Includes meeting transcript highlights (top 3 key points from ai_summary)
Includes next steps section (extracted from proposal terms section)
Includes action items if available
Message is threaded if posting to existing room with prior messages
Formatted with Block Kit sections, dividers, and buttons (Download PDF, View Deal)
stories.notes: Extend slack-deal-room-update to accept a 'proposal_briefing' payload type. Use the existing Block Kit patterns from slack-block-kit skill.

stories.title: Post briefing pack into deal room on proposal ready
acceptance: After deal room exists (new or existing), post the full briefing pack message
Uses slack-deal-room-update with proposal_briefing payload
Includes PDF download button pointing to signed URL
Records in slack_notifications_sent to prevent duplicate posts
Works for both new rooms (welcome + briefing) and existing rooms (briefing only)
stories.notes: This ties PDR-003 and PDR-004 together. The pipeline calls slack-deal-room-update after ensuring the room exists.

stories.title: Async company research enrichment after proposal ready
acceptance: After proposal reaches 'ready', fire-and-forget async enrichment job
Extracts domain from contact email (e.g. owen@aprilking.co.uk → aprilking.co.uk)
Runs company-research or lead-research skill against the domain
Updates contact record: full_name (if null), title, company name
Updates deal record: company name, description with enriched intel
Posts enrichment summary to deal room as a follow-up message (~60s after proposal)
Graceful failure: enrichment errors logged but never surface to user
stories.notes: New edge function: proposal-enrich-deal. Called from pipeline as non-blocking background task. Uses existing company-research skill or web search. Results posted to deal room via slack-deal-room-update.

stories.title: Update deal room with enrichment results
acceptance: After enrichment completes, post a summary to the deal room
Includes: company overview, key people, funding/revenue if found, tech stack
Message is threaded under the original briefing pack message
Slack ts from PDR-005 briefing message used for threading
If no deal room exists (Slack not connected), skip silently
stories.notes: This is the async follow-up that lands in the deal room ~60s after the proposal. Gives the rep enriched context before their next touchpoint.

parallelGroups.reason: Independent — room creation vs message builder

mvp.delivers: Auto deal creation + deal room with full briefing pack. Enrichment deferred.
